Operation 'createCharacter' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description explains inputs well but lacks clarity on what is returned and the immediate availability of the created character. Added return value details and side effect information to improve AI agent understanding of post-creation state.

data.current_description: Dynamically create a new AI character by providing basic information such as name, voice type, and backstory.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new AI character with the provided configuration including name, voice type, and backstory. Returns the newly created character object with its unique character ID. The character is immediately available for use in interactive experiences after creation.
data.reasoning: The current description explains inputs well but lacks clarity on what is returned and the immediate availability of the created character. Added return value details and side effect information to improve AI agent understanding of post-creation state.

message: Operation 'updateCharacter' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on return value and the requirement to specify character ID. Enhanced both to clarify partial update behavior, return value, and required identifier for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Update existing details of a character. Only pass the character information that needs to be updated; the rest will remain unchanged.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing character's configuration with provided fields while preserving unchanged properties. Supports partial updates - only specified fields are modified. Returns the updated character object reflecting all changes. Requires the character ID to identify which character to update.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on return value and the requirement to specify character ID. Enhanced both to clarify partial update behavior, return value, and required identifier for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getCharacter' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description mentions search parameters but lacks clarity on what information is returned and whether both parameters are required or optional. Added details about return value structure and parameter requirements to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve all information about a character. You can search by charID or charName.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves complete information about a specific character including configuration, voice settings, backstory, and metadata. Supports lookup by either character ID (charID) or character name (charName). Returns the full character details object. Requires at least one search parameter to identify the target character.
data.reasoning: Description mentions search parameters but lacks clarity on what information is returned and whether both parameters are required or optional. Added details about return value structure and parameter requirements to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'cloneCharacter' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks clarity on what is returned and the state of the original character after cloning. Added return value details, clarification that original is preserved, and better explanation of KB cloning option for improved AI agent understanding of the operation's effects.

data.current_description: Clone an existing character. Optionally clone the character's Knowledge Base (KB) as well.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a duplicate copy of an existing character with all its properties and configuration. Optionally includes cloning the character's Knowledge Base (KB) to replicate its training data and context. Returns the newly cloned character object with a unique character ID. The original character remains unchanged.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on what is returned and the state of the original character after cloning. Added return value details, clarification that original is preserved, and better explanation of KB cloning option for improved AI agent understanding of the operation's effects.
